author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

The framework already guarantees all the `postModuleEventAcquire` finish before the task to run the Event transition is scheduled. This guarantee comes from the `WaitingTaskHolder` being kept alive until the end of `Worker::runAcquireAfterAsyncPrefetch()`
https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/87bf18149bda07d5e40c9d7c31a703eb2f9fd726/FWCore/Framework/src/Worker.cc#L257-L281
whereas the `{pre,post}ModuleEventAcquire` signals are called (deep) in the `implDoAcquire()` call chain (called from `Worker::runAcquire()`).

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2145

#### PR validation:

Tests pass
title: Remove unnecessary synchronization between acquire and event callbacks of ModuleEventAllocMonitor
